query:
SELECT c.externalId, c.name, s.id as svcId, s.serviceType, s.planName, s.connectionId, s.phoneNumber, s.locationAddress, s.monthlyCost, s.supplierName
FROM customers c
LEFT JOIN services s ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Yiros%' OR c.name LIKE '%Albion%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Maitland%'
   OR s.locationAddress LIKE '%Albion%' OR s.locationAddress LIKE '%Crosby%'
   OR s.locationAddress LIKE '%Maitland%' OR s.locationAddress LIKE '%High St%'
ORDER BY c.name
LIMIT 20;

FROM customers c
LEFT JOIN services s ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Yiros%' OR c.name LIKE '%Albion%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Maitland%'
   OR s.locationAddress LIKE '%Albion%' OR s.locationAddress LIKE '%Crosby%'
   OR s.locationAddress LIKE '%Maitland%' OR s.locationAddress LIKE '%High St%'
ORDER BY c.name
LIMIT 20;
